owner_operator_stated: Father-daughter team Dr. Paul Ladone and Dr. Kelsey Ladone, three-generation family practice serving Lisle/Naperville/Wheaton for 50+ years.
notes: Address (2009 Warrenville Rd, Lisle IL 60532) and phone (630-968-9700) corroborated exactly on the practice's own site. Vendor_website_hint 'Aadsm.Org' was wrong (unrelated sleep-medicine association website); real site found via search. No careers/hiring page (checked /careers, 404). Not a multi-location/DSO brand.

owner_operator_stated: Current site lists Drs. Hegazy, Rincon and Warhekar as the practicing dentists; no mention of 'Vibhakar' anywhere on the current site content reviewed.
notes: Address (3902 Harlem Ave / 3902 S Harlem Ave, Lyons IL 60534) and phone (708-442-1900) match the record and the vendor hint domain (alldentdentalcenters.com) exactly, so the location/brand is correctly identified. However the record's named entity 'VIBHAKAR AND VIBHAKAR D.D.S.P.C.' does not match the dentists currently shown on the practice's own website (Hegazy, Rincon, Warhekar) -- a web search additionally surfaced a testimonial describing a patient who 'had been seeing Dr. Vibhakar for years and now sees Dr. Hegazy,' consistent with an ownership/staff transition at this same brand and address. Treat as successor: original owners Drs. Charu/Kamal Vibhakar appear to have been succeeded by the current Hegazy/Rincon/Warhekar team under the same 'Alldent Dental Center' brand.

owner_operator_stated: Dr. Linda Gioia Arrich, DDS, and associates provide dental care for the Montgomery community.
notes: Address (1901 Douglas Rd, Montgomery IL 60538) and phone (630-554-0040) corroborated exactly on the practice's own site, and vendor_website_hint (westsuburbandental.com) is correct. Site markets itself as 'Dentist in Oswego & Montgomery' -- a two-location group practice, not a single independent office. No careers/hiring page (checked /careers, 404).

Address (1556 Douglas Rd, Montgomery IL 60538) and phone (630-859-9340) corroborated exactly on the practice's own site, and vendor_website_hint (1stdentalcareillinois.com) is correct. Site does not name any individual dentist (only references a generic 'Degree in Advanced Dentistry from University of Minnesota'); third-party listings (not the practice's own site) name a Dr. Abdul G. Malaki, but that is not corroborated on the practice's own pages so is not included in the doctors list. No careers/hiring page found.

owner_operator_stated: Sindelarfamilydental.com presents Dr. Jeff Sindelar as the current lead/owner, with Dr. John Irving referenced as a partner; the original practice website (dentist567.com, 'John S. Irving DDS, PC - Drs. Irving & Sindelar') no longer resolves (connection refused).
notes: Address (567 S Washington St, Naperville IL 60540) and phone (630-355-2625) corroborated exactly, but at a DIFFERENT, rebranded site than the record entity's historical domain. Record entity is 'John S Irving PC,' the founder who took over the original 1954 practice in 1995; his nephew Dr. Jeff Sindelar joined in 2013. The practice's old domain (dentist567.com, formerly branded 'John S. Irving DDS, PC - Drs. Irving & Sindelar') is now dead (ECONNREFUSED). The address/phone now resolve to 'Sindelar Family Dental,' whose own site presents Dr. Sindelar as founder/owner and only ambiguously references Dr. Irving -- consistent with an ownership succession from Irving to Sindelar at the same office. No careers/hiring page found on the current site.

owner_operator_stated: Founded in 1986 by Dr. John A. Jaeschke; Drs. Todd W. Spragg and Maria N. DeFilippis practice alongside him at the same historic downtown Naperville office.
notes: Address (10 E Benton Ave, Naperville IL 60540) and phone (630-355-0100) corroborated exactly, and vendor_website_hint (dentistofnaperville.net) is correct. Page mentions employee benefits (health insurance, vacation) in the context of the practice's own team but provides no careers/openings URL, so no dedicated hiring page exists. Not a multi-location/DSO brand.
